sn37.16-23:1.1:
"When, Anuruddha, a woman possesses five qualities, with the breakup of the body, after death, she is reborn in a good destination, in a heavenly world. What are the five?
"She has faith, she has a sense of shame, she is afraid of wrongdoing, she is without malice,
wise. When a woman possesses these five qualities she is reborn in a good destination, in a heavenly world."
